task: Create a CloudFormation template snippet for an S3 bucket with versioning enabled and public access blocked
solution_criteria: must include S3 bucket resource with VersioningConfiguration and PublicAccessBlockConfiguration properties, valid CloudFormation syntax

task: Write a Python function that extracts the region and service name from an AWS ARN string
solution_criteria: must parse ARN format (arn:aws:service:region:account-id:resource), return region and service as a tuple or dictionary, handle invalid ARN inputs

task: Create a regular expression pattern to validate AWS IAM role names according to AWS naming rules
solution_criteria: must allow alphanumeric characters, hyphens, and underscores, enforce minimum length of 1 and maximum of 64 characters, not allow spaces or special characters
